mapper.insert: insert into comment (body,article_id,author_id) values (#{body},(select id from article a where a.slug=#{slug}),(select u.id from user u where u.username=#{currentUsername}))
mapper.select: select c.*,u.id,u.username,u.bio,u.image, a.author_id as articleAuthorId from comment c join user u on u.id=c.author_id join article a on a.id=c.article_id where u.username=#{currentUsername} and a.slug=#{slug} order by c.created_at desc

select c.*,u.id as "author.userId",u.username as "author.username",u.bio as "author.bio",u.image as "author.image", a.author_id as articleAuthorId from comment c join user u on u.id=c.author_id join article a on a.id=c.article_id where a.id=#{id} order by c.created_at desc
